title: Closeout Step 6 must write terminal track entry with event: closeout + completed: true
summary: Wakeup Step 3b checks for completed==true or event=="closeout" to detect a clean session. Closeout Step 6 never wrote those fields, so every session showed INTERRUPTED regardless of actual outcome. Fix: Step 6 must write a terminal entry with both event:closeout and completed:true.
decision: Closeout Step 6 terminal entry format is now: {"event": "closeout", "completed": true, "session_id": "...", "ts": "...", "phase": "review", "session_number": N}
evidence: Observed in session-20260405-0012 (Minder s64) — previous session had complete gardener work but wakeup reported INTERRUPTED because terminal track entry was missing.
decision_reason: High-impact taught pattern (wakeup/closeout/track integrity). Prioritized for delivery.
